chapter_title: Type 3 Problems Based on Mathematical Operation

passages.passage_text:
Directions (Example Nos. 11-15) Study the following information carefully and answer the given questions. A number arrangement machine, when given as input line of number rearranges them following a particular rule in each step. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement.

Input: 25, 22, 15, 36, 29, 99
Step I: 7, 4, 6, 9, 11, 18
Step II: 10, 4, 5, 18, 18, 81
Step III: 625, 484, 225, 1296, 841, 9801
Step IV: 15625, 10648, 3375, 46656, 24389, 970299
Step V: 5, 4.4, 3, 7.2, 9.76, 19.8
Step VI: 7, 4, 6, 9, 2, 9
Step VII: 27, 24, 17, 38, 31, 101
Step VIII: 20, 17, 10, 31, 24, 94
Step IX: 75, 66, 45, 108, 87, 297
Step X: 14, 8, 12, 18, 22, 36
Step XI: 3, 0, 4, 3, 7, 0
Step XII: -3, 0, -4, -3, -7, 0
Step XIII: 49, 16, 36, 81, 121, 324

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Input is 11, 15, 19, 12, 14, then find the Step XIII for this input.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step I of a given input is as follows '7, 9, 6, 15, 16, 18', then find the input.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step V is '6, 9, 12, 75, 8', then find the input.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If input is '35, 95, 43, 45, 98, 81', then find Step XII.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If input is '78, 12, 27, 16, 87, 45', then find the Step II.
